title: Sort/Order boards on a Dashboard
excerpt: Currently, when you add boards to your dashboard, this orders your boards by “Recently used”. It would be awesome if the drag/drop feature can be enabled or any other way to sort boards.

posts.author: AlinaNZ (Alina Panchenko)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, when you add boards to your dashboard, this orders your boards by “Recently used”. It would be awesome if the drag/drop feature can be enabled or any other way to sort boards.
